narrative:
Catawba Twp township has 3,382 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
